title: lepidium limenophylax
intro: Lepidium limenophylax, also known as cress, is a type of annual plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lepidium limenophylax include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and seeds of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
